Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Constellation Brands–Marvin Sands Performing Arts Center (Finger Lakes Community College)
Canandaigua, NY
Previous Names:
Finger Lakes Performing Arts Center (Finger Lakes Community College) (Changed after 2005)
Seating Capacity: 17000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 10
  DMB  (3)
  Dave & Tim  (7)

Longest Performance:
06.05.97 - Seek Up (16:27)
Venue Picture
Description
The Rochester Broadway Theatre League manages the Finger Lakes Performing Arts Center (FLPAC) in Canandaigua, New York. FLPAC is located on the campus of the Finger Lakes Community College and is owned by the County of Ontario. This unique natural amphitheater opened in 1984 and is summer home to the Rochester Philharmonic Orchestra.

3355 Marvin Sands Dr.
Canandaigua, NY 14424
